race.comment: ONLY US (2) has gone back-to-back at this track recently, storming home to win in a photo over 1400m here last time out. Looks well suited now out to the mile and Hammarquist has him humming. May get back in the run but watch for him flying late in the race. WESTERN IMPACT (3) finished in 11th last time at this track in a disappointing performance. Finds a nice race and can bounce back. ODIN OMEN (5) was out of the money when resuming from a spell last start over 1200m at this track. Has a fair record when second up, including three top-three finishes. Fitter so expect a better run this time. SHEEZA SHEILA (11) was safely held when resuming last start over 1200m at this track, finishing 11th. Should run well in this more suitable assignment. CANDLELIGHT SHERIF (1) will be better for the fresh run for the new stable and is not to be discounted.
